title.en: Sealing cable reticulation systems and conduits

group-parts.group: Sealing cable reticulation systems and conduits
group-parts.name: overview

prose.en: In shared facilities, uniquely identifiable Security Construction and Equipment Committee (SCEC)-approved tamper-evident seals should be used to provide evidence of any tampering or illicit access to TOP SECRET cable reticulation systems. In addition, TOP SECRET conduits should be sealed with a visible smear of conduit glue to prevent access.
